name: Vegetable Burritos
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound fresh mushrooms, cleaned and chopped
recipeInstructions:
Sauce:
1. Sauté the chopped onion and crushed garlic in 1/4 cup water for 5 minutes.
2. Add the canned chili peppers and stir.
3. Add the remaining sauce ingredients (chili powder, cumin, coriander, cayenne) and mix well.
4. Simmer for 15 minutes. Set aside.
Filling:
1. Sauté the chopped onion, green bell pepper, and mushrooms in the water used for sautéing the sauce until tender (about 5 minutes).
2. Add the corn, zucchini, chili powder, and cumin; continue to sauté another 10 minutes.
3. Set aside.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Place about 1/3 to 1/2 cup of the filling at the center of each tortilla.
6. Roll up each tortilla tightly.
7. Pour the remaining sauce evenly over the bottom of a covered casserole dish.
8. Arrange the burritos seam-side down in the dish, covering them completely with sauce.
9. Bake for 30 minutes.
Variation:
For "cheese" burritos, use potato-based Melty Cheese instead of the sauce provided above.
